flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Erwin Technical College rose 90% between 2007 and 2010 ($2.6k → $5.0k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Erwin Technical College fell 25% between 2006 and 2009 (79.3% → 59.7%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 24% at Erwin Technical College vs the 2018–2022 baseline (556 vs 735).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Erwin Technical College fell 13% between 2021 and 2024 (665 → 581).
